summary: Employee #1 in engineering, responsible for owning and rebuilding the product's codebase, architecture, and UX. This role includes migrating to a new tech stack (React Native (Expo), Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2) and has CTO potential.
salary_range: Founding equity, scaled to scope. Cash is lean pre-raise and grows when closed.

summary: Zulip is building an open-source collaboration platform and is seeking a Senior Backend/Infrastructure Engineer. This role involves building, operating, and scaling Zulip Cloud and self-hosted instances, working across backend features, performance, and infrastructure, reviewing code, maintaining production health, and providing technical direction.

Hatchet, an open-source platform for scalable background jobs, is hiring Full-Stack Engineers to build engineering primitives like queues and durable execution. The stack includes Postgres, Go, Typescript, React, and Kubernetes.

Adacore, maintainer of open-source tools in the Ada ecosystem including GNAT, GCC's Ada frontend, is hiring Software Engineers. Roles include GCC/GNU toolchain developers and Senior Static Analysis Software Engineers. Positions are full-time and can be remote or on-site.

PostHog makes dev tools helping product engineers build successful products. They are growing through autonomy and transparency, have interesting technical problems, and plan to build 20 more products. They offer a public handbook and compensation calculator.

Branch3D is developing a novel real-time 3D structural modeling and design tool for Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC). The company is less than 10 people, incubated within a larger engineering firm, and is scaling up its pilot programs. They are seeking experienced individuals for technical and go-to-market roles, with a focus on quality and innovation.

DrSwarm is building AI-driven workflow automation for healthcare clinics / health systems (scheduling, RCM/billing workflows, patient ops). This is a true 0→1 role: ship fast, talk to customers, own systems end-to-end. The position is remote, targeting candidates in the US or LATAM region, with required overlap with US Pacific hours.
salary_range: Market with mix of base + bonus + meaningful equity

summary: FusionAuth simplifies authentication and authorization for developers, offering a unique deployment model, API-first approach, mature product, and a full-featured free version.

SecureBio is a nonprofit working to protect the world from catastrophic pandemics. We operate the world’s largest metagenomic biosurveillance network, which performs daily sequencing of wastewater samples and nasal swabs to screen for emerging pathogens. Our computational team develops detection pipelines responsible for rapid processing of deep sequencing data in order to flag potential threats.
